caption: The video shows a webpage from the IRS website, specifically a section discussing rules and guidelines for withdrawals from IRAs and retirement plans to avoid penalties. The content explains that certain withdrawals can be repaid over a 3-year period or have taxes spread over three years. It also mentions specific details about 2020 withdrawals from inherited IRAs, noting that they cannot be repaid but may be spread over three years for income inclusion. The page provides links for more information on coronavirus relief for retirement plans and IRAs, as well as frequently asked questions regarding required minimum distributions. At the bottom of the screen, there is a timestamp indicating the page was last reviewed or updated on December 12, 2022, along with options to share or print the page. The cursor is visible, suggesting that the user is navigating through the page.
